message:
feat(security): implement consuming verify() for CapabilityToken phantom types [MOR/C3.1]

Change CapabilityVerifier::verify() from borrowing (&CapabilityToken) to
consuming (CapabilityToken) to enforce that unverified tokens cannot be
reused after verification.  This prevents use-before-verify and
double-verify patterns at compile time.

Changes:
- verify() now takes owned CapabilityToken, returns CapabilityToken<Verified>
- verify_claims() remains as non-consuming reference variant
- Polling/Webhook archetype traits require CapabilityToken<Verified>
- policy.rs: documented intentional unverified claim access for simulation
- 17 phantom type acceptance tests (7 new)
- Updated ~95 call sites across connectors, E2E tests, and platform crates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
